div.p: cmd1 | cmd2 | cmd3 — All commands run simultaneously

text.tspan: // Parent must close FDs or readers never see EOF
// Parent must close FDs or readers never see EOF

div.h3: KEY INSIGHT: Concurrency is NOT Sequential

ul.li: Wrong mental model: cmd1 runs -> completes -> cmd2 runs -> completes -> cmd3 runs.
Correct model: All 3 commands start at T1-T3 and run in parallel.
Sync: Handled by kernel. Writer blocks if pipe full (64KB). Reader blocks if pipe empty.
